task_completion.description: The expense description is set to 'Client Meeting - Q4 Strategy'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Odoo Expenses app, an expense record shows the description 'Client Meeting - Q4 Strategy'.

task_completion.description: The expense total amount is set to 85.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The total amount field for the expense is set to 85.00.

task_completion.description: The employee for the expense is set to 'Ernest Reed'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Employee field on the expense form or report is set to 'Ernest Reed'.

task_completion.description: An expense report is created for the expense.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An expense report view is visible, grouping the expense, typically accessed by clicking 'Create Report'.

task_completion.description: The expense report is submitted to the manager.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The expense report status indicates it has been submitted (e.g., status is 'Submitted' or 'To Approve', or the 'Submit to Manager' button has been clicked and processed).

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with Odoo.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser (like Firefox) navigating the Odoo web interface at localhost:8069.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing curl, python scripts, or direct database queries to create the expense.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Odoo interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Odoo 17 Expenses app interface is visible, rather than a text editor or mock interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses Odoo 17 Community Edition. The agent must create an expense with description 'Client Meeting - Q4 Strategy', amount 85.00, and employee 'Ernest Reed'. After creating the expense, the agent must create an expense report and submit it. The final state should show the expense report submitted (status 'To Approve' or 'Submitted').
